title: Hermitcraft TCG CIT
description: CIT resource pack for the trading card game known as Hermitcraft TCG created by VintageBeef
body:
### About
This is a client-side resource pack which contains custom item textures as a replacement to the map art items created by VintageBeef in Hermitcraft Season 9. Currently contains 55 Hermit cards, 43 single use effect cards, 20 attachable effect cards, 20 item cards as well as 6 custom tokens. Alter Ego Hermit cards will be added in the future.

A client-side mod is required for this pack to work either [**Variants-CIT**](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) for 1.21.4, [**CIT Resewn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for 1.21–1.21.1 or [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/home) for 1.21–1.21.4.

Creating the items also requires the datepack called [**Name Formatting Station**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/name-formatting-station-datapack) or something similar to be installed either on a server or in a single player world.
